title: goniophlebium loriceum var. latipes
intro: Goniophlebium loriceum var. latipes, also known as the latiped leaf, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern, which means it grows on other plants, typically trees, in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, Goniophlebium loriceum var. latipes has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and it is believed to provide health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting immune function.
